Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7075 0 0}There were seven doors in the Desert at the start... meaning we have to clear seven different areas.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}I used to think this would take forever, but now there are only two doors left.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}Now's the time to step it up, guys. Let's press on![n]{f 1 1}
